subject: chemistry
title: 20N.1.HL.TZ0.34
question_html:
Which molecule can be oxidized to a carboxylic acid by acidified potassium dichromate(VI)?

A.  Propan-1-ol

B.  Propan-2-ol

C.  2-methylpropan-2-ol

D.  Propanone
examiners_html: Another well answered question with the vast majority understanding that only propan-1-ol can be oxidized to a carboxylic acid.
